node.html:
I’m Shay. I’ve spent many years in cybersecurity and machine learning - across research, engineering, ML, data science, and leadership roles.

Now I’m exploring different areas of AI, especially at the intersection of security, control, defense, and observability.

I originally built this website to store my cocktail recipes. Now it’s home to many of the random things I do or think about - tech, philosophy, data, mathematics, travel, stupid side projects, smart side projects, lectures I give, etc. Enjoy!
